background: A manufacturer performs an operational life test on ceramic capacitors and finds they exhibit constant failure rate with a value of $3 \times 10^{-6}$ failure per hour.

task.query: What is the reliability of a capacitor at 1000 h?
task.answer:
The reliability of a capacitor at 1000 h is

$$
R(t=1000)=e^{-\lambda t}=e^{-3\left(10^{-6}\right)(1000)}=0.997
$$

The resulting reliability plot is shown in Fig. 2.2.
